calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2015 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Aug-19-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Aug-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Leonard Peter Mastromonaco, Esq. (415-956-4030), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL, moving party.
No other appearance.

No arguments heard. Court confirms that Motion for Attorney's Fees on September 1, 2015 to be heard in Dept. 501 is already taken off calendar pursuant to the request of the moving party.

Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF 490 TANZANITE LLC's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel is GRANTED. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-05-2015 Set For Case Management Conference On Sep-09-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Against Plaintiff 490 Tanzanite, Llc
Off Calendar May-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Steven C. Williams, Esq. of Fried & Williams, (415-421-0100), for Propark America West LLC, Defendant and moving party.
Leonard P. Mastromonaco, Esq. (415-956-4030 ext. 1), for 490 Tanzanite LLC, Plaintiff and opposing party.

In the commencement of the hearing, Court announces its tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden and opposing party failed to present admissible evidence to create a triable issue of fact re: service of notice in accordance with the commercial lease agreement or waiver of the notice requirements.

Court hears ARGUMENTS. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT PROPARK AMERICA WEST LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden and opposing party failed to present admissible evidence to create a triable issue of fact re: service of notice in accordance with the commercial lease agreement or waiver of the notice requirements. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Against Plaintiff 490 Tanzanite, Llc
Off Calendar May-14-2015 Continued To May-20-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PROPARK AMERICA WEST LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Against Plaintiff 490 Tanzanite, LLC is CONTINUED to May 20, 2015 on Court's own motion. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Against Plaintiff 490 Tanzanite, Llc
Off Calendar May-06-2015 Continued To May-14-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Steven C. Williams, Esq. of Fried & Williams, (415-421-0100), for Propark America West, LLC, Defendant and moving party.
Leonard P. Mastromonaco, Esq. of Mastromonaco Law Group, (415-956-4030), for 490 Tanzanite LLC, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Plaintiff's Separate Statement and CCP 473 Declaration, electronically filed the night before the hearing, were submitted to the Court, off the record, prior to the hearing.

In the commencement of the hearing, Court announces its finding of the submission of Plaintiff's Separate Statement and CCP 473 Declaration untimely. Defendant and moving party's counsel agrees on the untimeliness of the pleadings and requests the Court to adopt the tentative ruling. Plaintiff and opposing party's counsel explains and apologizes to the Court re the untimeliness of the filing of the pleadings. Counsel further indicates that Plaintiff will seek an order shortening time to hear the CCP 473. Defendant's counsel stipulates to the order shortening time application.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments and explanation as to the untimeliness of the filing of Plaintiff's Separate Statement and CCP 473 Declaration, rules as follows: DEFENDANT PROPARK AMERICA WEST LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to May 14, 2015 at 9:30am in Dept. 501, to allow review of the pleadings submitted today. Parties waive the notice. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2014 Set For Trial On Jun-08-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Continued To Dec-03-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
